title: Data Analytics Bootcamp
shortDescription: Hands-on analytics, dashboards, and decision intelligence for modern teams.
fullDescription: An intensive programme designed for professionals who want to turn raw data into strategic insights using modern analytics workflows and BI tooling.
certification: LIMCO Certificate of Competence + portfolio assessment

title: Project Finance Foundations
shortDescription: Core financial modelling and funding strategy for infrastructure and growth projects.
fullDescription: Develop practical finance skills for planning, funding, and evaluating projects with confidence, including risk and return modelling.

title: Regulatory Compliance Masterclass
shortDescription: Build robust compliance cultures aligned to South African and global standards.
fullDescription: This programme equips compliance officers and managers to map obligations, manage audits, and implement practical governance controls.

title: Strategic Leadership Executive Programme
shortDescription: Lead transformation with strategic clarity, communication, and execution discipline.
fullDescription: A premium executive learning track focused on strategic direction, leading people through change, and creating measurable business impact.

title: Business Process Optimization
shortDescription: Redesign operational workflows for efficiency, quality, and scalable growth.
fullDescription: Learn to audit current operations, eliminate friction, and establish measurable service excellence across teams.
